sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Compare segmentation
before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

print("Before nodes:")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:3]}...")

print("\nAfter nodes:")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:3]}...")

# Find the changed cell by comparing ascii
before_lines = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(64):
    for c in range(64):
        if before_lines[r][c] != after_lines[r][c]:
            print(f"\nChanged at ({r},{c}): '{before_lines[r][c]}' -> '{after_lines[r][c]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
